zh.lifeSummary: 當Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine於1070年7月16日出生在法國德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧時，他的父親Gautier de Brienne I25歲，母親Eustachie de Tonnerre31歲。他於大約1103年與Mathilde de Noyers在法國德 艾斯特奧布巴-素-結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1127年1月3日在法國德 艾斯特奧布巴-素-享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine于1070年7月16日出生在法国德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧时，他的父亲Gautier de Brienne I25岁，母亲Eustachie de Tonnerre31岁。他于大约1103年与Mathilde de Noyers在法国德 艾斯特奧布巴-素-结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1127年1月3日在法国德 艾斯特奧布巴-素-享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Milon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Czech: from a short form of various compound names formed with mil ‘grace, favour’, now also used in the English-speaking world. Sometimes, however, it may be chosen with reference to the northern Italian city (Italian Milano), the capital of Lombardy.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine was born on 16 July 1070, in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France, his father, Gautier de Brienne I, was 25 and his mother, Eustachie de Tonnerre, was 31. He married Mathilde de Noyers about 1103, in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 3 January 1127, in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine est né le 16 juillet 1070, à Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France, son père, Gautier de Brienne I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eustachie de Tonnerre, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde de Noyers environ 1103, à Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 3 janvier 1127, à Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine am 16. Juli 1070 in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gautier de Brienne I 25 und seine Mutter Eustachie de Tonnerre 31. Er hat um 1103 in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich Mathilde de Noyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 3. Januar 1127 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine è nato il il 16 luglio 1070 nel Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Gautier de Brienne I, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Eustachie de Tonnerre, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde de Noyers circa 1103, nel Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 3 gennaio 1127, nel Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Bar-sur-Seine,10034,Aube,Grand Est,FRANC: フランスグランド エストアウベバー-スル-セアイン

ja.Champagne, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-A: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエンテ-マリティメチャンプアグン
ja.lifeSummary: Milon II de Bar-sur-Seineが1070年7月16日にフランスグランド エストアウベブリーネ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Gautier de Brienne Iは25歳，母Eustachie de Tonnerreは31歳であった。約1103年にフランスグランド エストアウベバー-スル-セアインでMathilde de Noyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1127年1月3日にフランスグランド エストアウベバー-スル-セアインで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine(이)가 1070년 7월 16일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 브리니-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gautier de Brienne I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Eustachie de Tonnerre(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1103년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 바-수-세이인에서 Mathilde de Noyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1127년 1월 3일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 바-수-세이인에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.16 JUL 1070–3 JAN 1127: 1070 оны Долоодугаар сарын 16–1127 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 3

pt.16 JUL 1070–3 JAN 1127: 16 de julho de 1070–3 de janeiro de 1127
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine nasceu em 16 de julho de 1070, em Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Gautier de Brienne I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eustachie de Tonnerre, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde de Noyers aproximadamente 1103, em Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1127, em Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine родился 16 июля 1070 г. в местности бриенне-ле-чaто, ауб, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Gautier de Brienne I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustachie de Tonnerre, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Noyers около 1103 г. в местности бар-сур-син, ауб, гранд эст, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 3 января 1127 г. в местности бар-сур-син, ауб, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

es.16 JUL 1070–3 JAN 1127: 16 de julio de 1070–3 de enero de 1127
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Milon II de Bar-sur-Seine nació el 16 de julio de 1070, en Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Gautier de Brienne I, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Eustachie de Tonnerre, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mathilde de Noyers aproximadamente 1103, en Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 3 de enero de 1127, en Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
